title: Eldoret, Uasin Gishu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Eldoret, Uasin Gishu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Eldoret is a city in Uasin Gishu with a population of 475,000. A major city in the Rift Valley, known as a center for athletics and the ‘Home of Champions’ for Kenyan runners.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
